name: Sugar 'n Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening until smooth.
2. Gradually add sugars, beating well at medium speed of an electric mixer.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Combine flour and remaining ingredients (baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, cloves) in a separate bowl.
5. Alternate adding the flour mixture and buttermilk to the creamed mixture, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Mix just until blended after each addition.
6. Stir in vanilla extract.
7. Grease two 9-inch round cake pans and line them with wax paper.
8. Pour batter into prepared pans.
9. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Cool in pans for 10 minutes before removing from pans and allowing to cool completely on wire racks.
11. Spread frosting between layers and on top and sides of cake.
Yield: One 2-layer cake.
